caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap, and over-ear black headphones sits in a recording studio against a background of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. A small label on the arm reads "Mackie Micro Super USA". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, with his facial expressions shifting slightly and his mouth opening and closing. He remains seated and centered in the frame, while his right arm, which features a tattoo on the shoulder and bicep, is partially visible and moves slightly. The lighting is dim and consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man's upper body and the recording equipment.
